intent_router.purpose: Classify the user's current turn into a high-level AI-first action.

dossier_updater.purpose: Translate user language into supported dossier updates without guessing.

directional_guidance.purpose: Give incomplete-information directional guidance before full recommendation.

retrieval_planner.purpose: Plan lightweight knowledge and web queries for the current turn.

recommendation_generator.purpose: Generate structured shortlist recommendations from dossier and retrieved context.

compare_generator.purpose: Compare two candidate options in family-readable language.

family_summary_writer.purpose: Produce a family-facing summary from the current recommendation set.

safety_style_guard.purpose: Keep language safe, non-guaranteeing, and respectful for Chinese families.
